evidence: 139-217 resolves and verifies a virtual key token but returns all token caveats without enforcing allowed_models or allowed_routes
204-213 folds already-recorded spend and checks only whether a cap is already exhausted; there is no reservation or requested-cost comparison
107-113 defaults revocation_kv_path to empty and 171-202 skip current snapshot checks when empty
suppressions: Token signature and embedded revoked status are checked at 156-163; configured snapshots are signature/freshness/full-predicate checked at 171-202, but these do not close the empty-default revocation path.

evidence: 245-267 defines a violation only as cloud dispatch of LocalOnly and never examines GatewayRoute.denied
283-295 gate therefore allows an explicit router Denied decision whenever the selected target is local
suppressions: 131-156 defaults production to Enforce and rejects shadow/report-only in production; 201-233 fails local on an empty compliance-module set.

evidence: 108-118 converts RoutingDecision::Denied into a LocalOnly GatewayRoute plus a boolean denied marker
142-149 trusts Envelope.label via read_label and can return CloudAllowed without provenance verification
suppressions: 69-126 fail local on router errors; 129-137 make empty or LocalOnly label destinations local. No runtime call site for route_from_envelope was found, so AGC-LABEL-UNVERIFIED is deferred rather than promoted as currently reachable.

evidence: 70-74 resolves caller-selected model aliases, including an operator-configured fallback
168-177 authorizes only key/token validity, expiry, optional revocation, and already-spent budget; it does not enforce token model or route caveats
115-127 defaults the application profile to Production but does not require the Gateway revocation path
suppressions: 155-163 rejects missing/empty credentials; 115-127 defaults policy mode/profile fail closed.

evidence: 29-34 exposes only unauthenticated healthz and authenticated preflight
83-95 preflight calls resolve_and_check before returning tenant_id
51-66 rejects missing, wrong-scheme, and empty bearer credentials

29-33 mounts preflight without any rate/concurrency layer; 83-91 accepts any syntactically valid bearer and invokes resolve_and_check, whose 144-150 path logs into OpenBao and performs KV lookup before determining the key is unknown.
suppressions: healthz returns only literal ok at 36-38. Preflight protects tenant disclosure because a valid key must resolve, but syntactically valid junk credentials still reach OpenBao; no router-local throttle closes that availability path.
